name: Ifrit
description: Ifrit is a high-ranking spirit; the ruler of flame which was sealed within Shizue Izawa by Demon Lord Leon Cromwell. He used to live in Dwelling of the Spirit before he was stolen by the "Blonde Demon" Leon Cromwell. After that, he was sealed within Shizue Izawa. As a result of this, it gave Shizue an extended lifespan.
